index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Snake</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1a2a1a;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh;flex-direction:column}canvas{display:block;border:2px solid #2a4a2a}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const CELL=20,COLS=30,ROWS=20;
let snake,dir,nextDir,food,score,dead,tick;
function init(){
  snake=[{x:15,y:10},{x:14,y:10},{x:13,y:10}];
  dir={x:1,y:0};nextDir={x:1,y:0};
  score=0;dead=false;tick=0;
  placeFood();
}
function placeFood(){
  let pos;
  do{pos={x:Math.floor(Math.random()*COLS),y:Math.floor(Math.random()*ROWS)};}
  while(snake.some(s=>s.x===pos.x&&s.y===pos.y));
  food=pos;
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  if(dead&&e.key===' '){init();return;}
  if(e.key==='ArrowUp'&&dir.y===0)nextDir={x:0,y:-1};
  if(e.key==='ArrowDown'&&dir.y===0)nextDir={x:0,y:1};
  if(e.key==='ArrowLeft'&&dir.x===0)nextDir={x:-1,y:0};
  if(e.key==='ArrowRight'&&dir.x===0)nextDir={x:1,y:0};
  if(['ArrowUp','ArrowDown','ArrowLeft','ArrowRight'].includes(e.key))e.preventDefault();
});
function update(){
  if(dead)return;
  tick++;
  const speed=Math.max(3,8-Math.floor(score/5));
  if(tick%speed!==0)return;
  dir=nextDir;
  const head={x:snake[0].x+dir.x,y:snake[0].y+dir.y};
  if(head.x<0||head.x>=COLS||head.y<0||head.y>=ROWS){dead=true;return;}
  if(snake.some(s=>s.x===head.x&&s.y===head.y)){dead=true;return;}
  snake.unshift(head);
  if(head.x===food.x&&head.y===food.y){score++;placeFood();}
  else snake.pop();
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#0d1a0d';ctx.fillRect(0,0,600,400);
  ctx.strokeStyle='#1a2a1a';ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
  for(let x=0;x<COLS;x++){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x*CELL,0);ctx.lineTo(x*CELL,400);ctx.stroke();}
  for(let y=0;y<ROWS;y++){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y*CELL);ctx.lineTo(600,y*CELL);ctx.stroke();}
  snake.forEach((s,i)=>{
    const bright=1-i/snake.length*0.6;
    ctx.fillStyle=i===0?'#00ff88':`rgba(0,${Math.floor(180*bright)},${Math.floor(80*bright)},1)`;
    ctx.fillRect(s.x*CELL+1,s.y*CELL+1,CELL-2,CELL-2);
    if(i===0){
      ctx.fillStyle='#000';
      ctx.fillRect(s.x*CELL+4,s.y*CELL+4,4,4);
      ctx.fillRect(s.x*CELL+12,s.y*CELL+4,4,4);
    }
  });
  const pulse=0.7+0.3*Math.sin(Date.now()*0.005);
  ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(255,50,50,${pulse})`;
  ctx.fillRect(food.x*CELL+2,food.y*CELL+2,CELL-4,CELL-4);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 18px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,10,20);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.4)';ctx.font='12px monospace';
  ctx.fillText('Arrow keys to move',10,395);
  if(dead){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,600,400);
    ctx.fillStyle='#ff4444';ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER',300,180);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='24px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,300,230);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='18px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Press SPACE to restart',300,280);
  }
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
init();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
